steps.title: Spot the main contrast
steps.content: The “Although” signals a contrast between critics' doubts and Hightower's actual success (farms with pick-your-own now exist nationwide).

steps.title: Apply the meaning
steps.content: Hinder means “prevent” or “block.” “Concerns didn't hinder efforts” states directly that doubts failed to stop Hightower. Enhance, misrepresent, and aggravate describe a different concept or relationship. B is correct.
